items.title: Visa is quietly building stablecoins into mainstream payment plumbing without you knowing
items.whyYouShouldCare: Visa's integration of stablecoins into payment systems could enhance crypto adoption, potentially increasing demand for Solana's ecosystem as a viable transaction platform.

items.title: DeFi protocol Carrot becomes first casualty of $285M Drift exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: The collapse of Carrot due to the Drift exploit highlights vulnerabilities in DeFi, which could impact investor confidence in Solana-based protocols.

items.title: XRP sentiment hits 2-year high, but why is price stuck?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Despite positive sentiment around XRP, stagnant price action indicates market hesitance, which could influence broader crypto trends affecting Solana's positioning.
